description: Fix CustomersView table: reduce checkbox size, compact row height. Enhance NodesView Cores tab with tooltip descriptions for protocol config fields. Enhance ResellersView with status column, customer count, and better empty state.
steps: 1. In panel/web/admin/src/views/CustomersView.vue: Update the :deep(.k-table__checkbox) styles - reduce width/height from 1rem (16px) to 14px. Add :deep(tbody td) { padding: 8px 14px; } to make rows more compact (currently 11px 14px from global style but may be inherited). Reduce overall row density by adjusting table cell padding.

2. In panel/web/admin/src/views/CustomersView.vue: Also reduce the .username-cell gap, avatar size via KAvatar size='xs' if available, and ensure the overall table looks tighter and more professional.

3. In panel/web/admin/src/views/NodesView.vue Cores tab: Add title attributes (HTML tooltip) to each KFormField in the protocol config forms. Use the label's :title prop or wrap in a span with title. Add descriptive tooltip text for each field explaining what it does. For example: Port - 'The port number the VPN service listens on', Network - 'The IP subnet assigned to VPN clients (CIDR notation)', Transport - 'UDP is faster, TCP is more reliable through firewalls', etc.

4. In panel/web/admin/src/views/NodesView.vue: Add the tooltip descriptions as i18n keys (nodes.tooltip_port, nodes.tooltip_network, nodes.tooltip_transport, etc.) in panel/web/admin/src/i18n.ts for all three locales.

5. In panel/web/admin/src/views/ResellersView.vue: Add a 'status' column (Active/Disabled) and 'customers' column (customer count) to the table columns. Render status with KStatusPill. Add import for KStatusPill.
6. In panel/web/admin/src/views/ResellersView.vue: Enhance empty state - add a more descriptive message and a call-to-action button. Update the existing KEmptyState to have better copy.
7. In panel/web/admin/src/views/ResellersView.vue: Replace hardcoded English strings with t() calls. Add required i18n keys to panel/web/admin/src/i18n.ts.
acceptance_criteria: Customer table checkboxes are 14px and rows are more compact
Protocol config fields in Cores tab have descriptive title tooltips on hover
Resellers table shows status and customer count columns
Resellers view uses i18n for all strings
findings: All changes are additive and backward-compatible. vue-tsc and vite build pass cleanly. All vitest tests pass. KFormField :hint prop works as expected for showing descriptive text below fields.
